title: rubus peracutus
intro: Rubus peracutus is a lesser-known species of bramble, commonly referred to as the "sharp thorn" due to its dense network of sharp thorns. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Rubus peracutus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus peracutus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
